opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is completely paralyzed; I'm throwing up everything, and the room spins violently if I try to stand.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've vomited everything for half a day, can't keep fluids down, feel faint standing, and I can't fully empty my bladder; I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.character: intense nausea/vomiting, bloating, and violent dizziness on standing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't keep anything down; near-collapse standing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a visceral (gastroparesis) flare of my hEDS dysautonomia
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: presyncope, dry mouth, and I can't fully empty my bladder
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have hEDS with gut/autonomic problems and flare, but this is severe

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: hypermobile Ehlers-Danlos syndrome with gastroparesis and dysautonomia

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: usual oral medications (couldn't keep down for 24h)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone, can't keep fluids down, and feel I'll collapse standing

objective_data_offered.value: about 110 lying down and ~135 standing (home wearable)
around 100/60 lying and ~85/50 standing on my home cuff
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: uncalibrated home cuff; low, consistent with volume depletion

objective_data_offered.value: vomit is not green/bile-stained and no blood; my mouth is very dry and I feel faint; my bladder feels full but I can't fully empty it
